ddls:
CREATE TABLE "content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content item */,
  "key" TEXT /* Unique key for the content item */,
  "filename" TEXT /* Filename of the content item */,
  "content_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content type */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content (e.g., image/jpeg, video/mp4) */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Metadata associated with the content item */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service used for content analysis */,
  "byte_size" INTEGER /* Size of the content item in bytes */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the content item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the content item was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the content */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the content */,
  "tags" TEXT /* JSON array of tags for content categorization */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the content (e.g., active, archived, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_content_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_type_id") REFERENCES content_types ("content_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_types" (
  "content_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content type */,
  "content_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the content type (e.g., image/jpeg, video/mp4) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the content type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the content type is active */,
  "mime_type" TEXT /* MIME type for the content type (e.g., image/jpeg) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata item */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content item the metadata belongs to */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata (e.g., identified, analyzed) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "metadata_type" TEXT /* Type of metadata (e.g., system, user-defined) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service (e.g., local, cloud) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the service is active */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the service for integration */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for service authentication */,
  "last_check" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last service health check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., content creator, analyst, admin) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content item being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the content */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the content was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the content was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access request */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_access_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content item the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the content item */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "is_major" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the version is a major update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_versions_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "storage" (
  "storage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each storage location */,
  "storage_name" TEXT /* Name of the storage location (e.g., local, cloud) */,
  "storage_path" TEXT /* Path to the storage location */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the storage location is active */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last storage health check */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the storage location */,
  "used_capacity" INTEGER /* Used capacity of the storage location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("storage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_storage" (
  "content_storage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content storage event */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content item being stored */,
  "storage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the storage location */,
  "storage_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the content was stored */,
  "storage_status" TEXT /* Status of the storage (e.g., active, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_storage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_storage_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_storage_storage_id FOREIGN KEY ("storage_id") REFERENCES storage ("storage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content item being analyzed */,
  "analysis_service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis service */,
  "analysis_result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., object detection, facial recognition) */,
  "analysis_status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the analysis */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_analysis_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_service_id") REFERENCES analysis_services ("analysis_service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_services" (
  "analysis_service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis service */,
  "analysis_service_name" TEXT /* Name of the analysis service (e.g., object_detection, facial_recognition) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the analysis service */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the service is active */,
  "last_check" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last service health check */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the service failed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_analysis" (
  "content_analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content analysis event */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content item being analyzed */,
  "analysis_service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis service */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the analysis */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_analysis_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_analysis_analysis_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_service_id") REFERENCES analysis_services ("analysis_service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., content usage, storage usage) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., content_creator, analyst, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the role is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the role assignment (e.g., active, revoked) */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the permission is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_permissions" (
  "content_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content permission assignment */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content item */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was assigned */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the permission assignment (e.g., active, revoked) */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_permissions_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)
